scripts.secrets:setup: cp .dev.vars.example .dev.vars && echo '✅ .dev.vars created. Please edit with your secrets.'
scripts.secrets:staging:put: wrangler secret put DISCORD_PUBLIC_KEY --env staging && wrangler secret put DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN --env staging && wrangler secret put HENRIKDEV_API_KEY --env staging
scripts.secrets:prod:put: wrangler secret put DISCORD_PUBLIC_KEY --env production && wrangler secret put DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN --env production && wrangler secret put HENRIKDEV_API_KEY --env production
